---
title: "Passages from the American note-books of Nathaniel Hawthorne"
---

## Passages from the American note-books of Nathaniel Hawthorne

**Author:** Nathaniel Hawthorne
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** London: Smith, Elder

### Notes

Hawthorne, Nathaniel,  1804-1864.
Title details:	

Published:	London : Smith, Elder and Co., 1868.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
